mission.title: konveyor: `config/` and `Makefile` bundle variables are out of date
mission.description: `config/` and `Makefile` bundle variables are out of date. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current konveyor deployment
steps.description:
Verify your konveyor version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n konveyor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=konveyor
helm list -n konveyor 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working konveyor installation.

steps.title: Review konveyor configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant konveyor configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n konveyor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=konveyor
kubectl get configmap -n konveyor -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=konveyor
```
It appears that this repo has been modifying `bundle/` without modifying `config/`

Updates should be put into config/ first, and then run `make bundle` to generate an update `bundle/`

For example [see

steps.title: Apply the fix for `config/` and `Makefile` bundle variables are out of date
steps.description:
👻 simplified tools/tackle-opdev.sh with `make bundle`
 `docker-build`, `bundle-build` fixes for docker where `--arch` is invalid

 `make deploy-olm` to run local unpublished changes from source installed with a new bundle.
- replicate behavior of installing from OperatorHub giving you better idea
```yaml
diff <(curl -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/konveyor/tackle2-operator/main/bundle/manifests/konveyor-operator.clusterserviceversion.yaml | yq -P 'sort_keys(..)') <(curl -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kaovilai/tackle2-operator/configmakefile-update/bundle/manifests/konveyor-operator.clusterserviceversion.yaml | yq -P 'sort_keys(..)')
```

steps.title: Upgrade konveyor to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade konveyor:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade konveyor konveyor/konveyor --namespace konveyor
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n konveyor
helm list -n konveyor
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n konveyor -l app.kubernetes.io/name=konveyor
kubectl get events -n konveyor --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "`config/` and `Makefile` bundle variables are out of date" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
👻 simplified tools/tackle-opdev.sh with `make bundle`
 `docker-build`, `bundle-build` fixes for docker where `--arch` is invalid

 `make deploy-olm` to run local unpublished changes from source installed with a new bundle.
codeSnippets:
bundle
├── manifests
│   ├── konveyor-operator.clusterserviceversion.yaml
│   ├── tackle.konveyor.io_addons.yaml
│   └── tackle.konveyor.io_tackles.yaml
├── metadata
│   └── annotations.yaml
└── tests
    └── scorecard
        └── config.yaml

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with konveyor installed or the issue environment reproducible.
